{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":431086,"duration_api_ms":427503,"ttft_ms":4840,"num_turns":53,"result":"Review complete. **Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS** — does not block pack or this-CP goal closeout.

- **No P0/P1/P2.** Two non-blocking P3 transparency notes (command outcomes are builder-recorded not reviewer-re-executed; plan/queue state files labeled "unrelated dirty" though generator-produced).
- **production_ready claim supported**: descriptor-only implementation is pure frozen-object builders with no write/network/real-data paths; `freezeCp674Result` + program no-write attestation force every write/runtime/leak flag false; validators enforce coverage, no-raw-payload, runtime-boundary closure, Claude-non-final, and contract==projection equality; tests assert these; contracts regenerated to `current_pack` CP00-674.
- **Boundaries intact**: Claude read-only/non-final, Hermes deterministic descriptor-only (no product runtime), no real client/matter/secret data.
- **Honest state**: pack reports `production_ready:false` / `PENDING_PACK_LEVEL_REVIEW`; nothing claims enterprise trust or runtime prematurely; hardened-review gate satisfied (auth preflight passed, read-tools mode, schema present, first attempt, no stale receipts).","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"0fef1cf6-6814-42ce-8065-aed4f8ec6e4b","total_cost_usd":2.4417757500000006,"usage":{"input_tokens":64,"cache_creation_input_tokens":117569,"cache_read_input_tokens":2075891,"output_tokens":26698,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":117569,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":511,"cache_read_input_tokens":113547,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4426,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4426},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1149,"outputTokens":21,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.0012540000000000001,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":64,"outputTokens":26698,"cacheReadInputTokens":2075891,"cacheCreationInputTokens":117569,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.4405217500000003,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS_WITH_FINDINGS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"Independent read-only review of CP00-674 (RP22 External Integrations I evidence/review bridge, descriptor-only, risk B, 40 units RP22.P02.M07.S13-RP22.P02.M09.S08). Pack identity and the deliverable (16/2/4/4/8/2/4=40) and micro-title (10/22/8=40) distributions are internally consistent across review-baseline, registry binding, requirements, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, prompt, and plan live_state. The implementation is genuinely descriptor-only: createExternalIntegrationsICp674EvidenceReviewBridgeDescriptor builds a frozen descriptor and freezeCp674Result stamps every result with writes_product_state=false, calls_external_provider_api=false, persists_*_token=false, stores_secret_material=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, includes_raw_external_payload=false, no_real_data=true; all runtime-open flags (external_api/oauth/permission/audit/fixture/test/persistence/hermes/claude) are false. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only and non-final (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, allowed_tools=Read/Grep/Glob), and Hermes is used only for deterministic descriptor packet/receipt handling (command_result pending_until_closeout_pack_validation, runtime_receipt_emitted=false), not product runtime. validators.js enforces coverage drift, per-row descriptor-only/customer-safe/no-raw-payload, every evidence_review_bridge_contract flag, runtime-boundary closure, Claude-non-final, and contract-file==generated-projection equality; model.test.js asserts coverage, descriptor boundaries, and projection match; both contract JSONs are regenerated to current_pack CP00-674 with historical CP666-CP673. The pack honestly represents a pending state (manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false/status=in_progress, construction-inspection PENDING_PACK_LEVEL_REVIEW, claude-review-result PENDING) and nothing claims production_ready or enterprise trust prematurely; the production_ready gate requires exactly one valid hardened review. Review-hardening infrastructure is present and satisfied (readiness auth_preflight passed, validation-report confirms prompt within size limit, no full diff/source in prompt, read-tools mode, forbidden tools absent, schema present; forbidden_review_evidence enumerates not_logged_in/malformed_json/quota_failure/permission_denied/tool_call_only_output/non_read_only_review; this is the first attempt with no stale raw-output/receipt artifacts). No P0/P1/P2 found. Two P3 transparency notes: (1) the 22/22 command matrix, npm test, and npm build outcomes are builder-recorded and could not be re-executed in this read-only review, though static/structural verification independently supports the descriptor/boundary/validator/test claims; (2) plan-state files closeout-pack-plan.json and next-pack-queue.json are classified as unrelated_dirty in changed-file-scope despite being produced by the pack generate step (intentional, since they are not implementation refs). Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or this-CP goal closeout. Final human approval for any enterprise-trust/runtime claim remains outside this receipt, as designed.","findings":[{"id":"CP674-P3-001","severity":"P3","title":"Validation command outcomes are builder-recorded, not re-executed in this read-only review","file":"docs/closeout-packs/cp00-674/command-evidence.json","line":104,"details":"command-evidence.json records a 22/22 pre-review validation matrix plus npm test and npm build all at exit_code 0. As a read-only reviewer (no Bash), I could not independently re-execute these commands, so their PASS status is agent/builder-reported evidence rather than reviewer-reproduced. My independent verification was static/structural: descriptor functions are pure frozen-object builders with no fs/network/real-data paths; freezeCp674Result and the program no-write attestation force all write/runtime/leak flags false; validators.js enforces coverage, per-row no-raw-payload, runtime-boundary closure, Claude-non-final, and contract==projection equality; model.test.js asserts these; and both contract JSONs are regenerated to current_pack CP00-674. That static evidence supports the descriptor-only production_ready_flag claim, but the runtime command outcomes themselves were not reproduced here.","recommendation":"Retain command-evidence.json plus readiness/auth artifacts as the authoritative execution record; treat this Claude receipt as independent static/boundary verification layered on top, not as re-execution of the validation matrix.","post_review_disposition":"informational_no_action_required"},{"id":"CP674-P3-002","severity":"P3","title":"Plan-state files classified as unrelated dirty though produced by the pack generate step","file":"artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-674/changed-file-scope.json","line":188,"details":"changed-file-scope.json lists docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json and docs/closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue.json under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved, yet both reflect this pack: plan live_state.pack_id and next-pack-queue live_latest_pack_id are CP00-674, and command-evidence includes npm run closeout-pack-plan:generate (exit 0). The classification is intentional under the worktree policy (only implementation refs count as pack scope, and these are generator-managed plan-state files, not source), so it does not cause drift or a boundary violation, but the 'unrelated' label is slightly imprecise. The CP674 coverage validator correctly resolves the pack via the manifest plan_binding_snapshot since the generated packs[] queue begins at CP00-675.","recommendation":"Optionally reclassify generator-produced plan/queue state files as related-but-non-implementation (or document the convention) to avoid implying they are wholly unrelated to the pack workflow.","post_review_disposition":"informational_no_action_required"}],"finding_counts":{"p0":0,"p1":0,"p2":0,"p3":2,"reported_p0":0,"reported_p1":0,"reported_p2":0,"reported_p3":2}},"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"de518a41-638b-4a9a-b2a9-611dbabcdfe3"}
